description: Learn how to braise meats and vegetables for maximum flavor.

steps.instruction: Sear the meat in a hot pan until browned on all sides.
Add aromatics like onions and garlic to the pan.
Deglaze the pan with broth or wine.
Cover and cook slowly in the oven or on the stovetop.

safety_tips: Always use a meat thermometer to ensure proper cooking temperatures.
Be cautious of hot splatters when searing meat.
